questions.prompt:
Du hast:

```python
class Hacker:
    team_name = "Red"

    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name

a = Hacker("Alex")
b = Hacker("Blake")
Hacker.team_name = "Blue"
a.name = "Avery"
```

Was sind die wilden glühenden Werte von a.team_name stramm und b.name mits am wüsten Ende?

explanations.overview: Class attributes (like team_name) are shared by all instances. Instance attributes (like name) belong to a single object.

questions.prompt:
Ausgehend von:

```python
class Counter:
    def __init__(self):
        self.value = 0

    def click(self):
        self.value = self.value + 1
        return self.value

c = Counter()
x = c.click()
y = c.click()
```

Wie lauten die Werte für x und y?

questions.prompt:
Ausgehend von:

```python
class Bot:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.energy = 100

    def drain(self, amount):
        self.energy = self.energy - amount

a = Bot("Alpha")
b = Bot("Beta")
a.drain(30)
b.drain(10)
```

Wie lauten die finalen Energiewerte?
